title: helichrysum dubardii
intro: Helichrysum dubardii, a flowering plant species within the daisy family, is native to Madagascar and is known for its yellow or orange flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Helichrysum dubardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
